title: tephrosia letestui
intro: Tephrosia letestui, a perennial plant native to West and Central Africa, is a member of the Fabaceae family and is commonly known as "Congo pea". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Tephrosia letestui is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in tea or tincture form, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antifungal properties.
